text:
Translate the Flask API in `src/` into a Java Spring Boot implementation in `dst/`.

The target must build with `mvn clean package -DskipTests` from `dst/`, run with `SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/*.jar`, and preserve the HTTP API behavior described in README.md. Do not wrap or call the Python source implementation; implement the Java service directly.
